control_awareness: Aware that P2P-C-001 requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000; P2P-C-002 prevents self-approval; P2P-C-003 requires pre-PO approval before order issuance.
expected_control_effect: The system will route the request for department head approval, enforcing segregation of duties and requiring approval before PO issuance.
overall_reason: Given the routine scenario with no special pressures and the clear approval thresholds, the best next step is to create a purchase request for the full amount with normal routing to trigger department head approval, ensuring compliance with all relevant controls.
reason: The purchase amount exceeds the manager approval threshold but is below division head level, so department head approval is required. Creating a single purchase request for the full amount is operationally reasonable and aligns with the standard process under no unusual pressure.
